content:
Happy Sunday!

We are hiring LLB graduates for the Legal Consultant role at EXO Edge, Mohali. If you're available to join on Monday, 13 July 2026, we'd love to connect with you.

Apply here: https://lnkd.in/evwdb6Jc

Candidates who have already applied may also visit us for the selection process. Immediate joiners only.

Date: Sunday, 12 July 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Venue: EXO Edge, Plot No. IT-C6, 6th Floor, Sebiz Square, IT Park, Sector 67, Mohali, SAS Nagar, Punjab – 160062
Google Maps: https://lnkd.in/gsen2Xak

#EXOEdge #Outsourcing #TRAQ #ExoEdgeCaree #WereHiring #LegalJobs #WalkInDrive #CyberIncidentResponse #Hiring #DataBreachReview #LegalProfessionals #ImmediateJoiners #MohaliJobs

Surbhi Kapoor Srishti Sharma Annu Bharti Jeevica Sharma Shivani Arora Vandini Gulati Nikhil Bhati umer shiekh Tejinder Kawatra Neelesh Pratap Singh Monika Sharma Ritu G. Kiran Kumar Kumar Sankalp Aman Mehraa Chandra Singh Trilok Singh Rawat Shalabh Shankhdhar Geetika Sharma Sonali Negi Gaurav Bisht Mansi Ghai
comment: Legal consulting in cyber response requires more than LLB knowledge—exposure to incident timelines, data privacy processes, and documentation standards can make new professionals far more effective from day one.
